login.title: Partner Login
login.subtitle: Access your partner dashboard
login.legalPrefix: By click continue, you agree to our

register.title: Bula akhaonte
register.subtitle: Ngwala dintlha tša gago gore o thomiše
register.hasAccount: Na o šetše o na le akhaonte?
register.legalPrefix: By click continue, you agree to our
register.successMessage: Thanks bakeng sa rekoto. Go tsenya akhaonte ya gago, ka kgopelo lebelela e-mail ya gago gomme o klike linki ya tiišetšo yeo re go rometšego yona.
register.passwordTooShort: Leina la yona le swanetše go ba le bonnyane bja ditlhaka tše 6

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.descriptionCode: Tsenya khoutu ya dinomoro tše 6 go tšwa go app ya gago ya netefatšo
twoFactor.descriptionRecovery: Tsenya ye nngwe ya dikhoutu tša gago tša pušetšo go saena
twoFactor.invalidRecoveryCode: Ka kgopelo tsenya khoutu ya pušetšo ya maleba (fomete: XXXXX-XXXXX)
twoFactor.invalidCode: Ka kgopelo tsenya khoutu ya dinomoro tše 6
twoFactor.helpText: Na o na le mathata? Ikgokaganye le thekgo go hwetša thušo.
twoFactor.invalidCodeError: Khoutu ye e sa amogelegego. Ka kgopelo, leka gape.

setup.subtitle: A re go beakanye. Ka kgopelo kgetha mohuta wa akhaonte ya gago go tšwela pele.
setup.selectError: Ka kgopelo kgetha mohuta wa akhaonte
setup.clinicDescription: Ke emela kliniki goba setheo sa tlhokomelo ya tša maphelo seo se nago le dingaka tše ntši
setup.labDescription: Ke emela laboratori ya diteko goba lefelo la go dira diteko
setup.individualDescription: Ke nna mošomi wa tša maphelo goba monyakišiši
setup.setupError: E paletšwe ke go feleletša go hlomaganya. Ka kgopelo, leka gape.

messages.errorFallback: Failed to send reset email. Ka kgopelo, leka gape.

success.title: Check your email
success.sentTo: We sent a password reset link to {{email}}
success.description: Ka kgopelo lekola lepokisi la gago la inbox gomme o latele ditaelo go tsošološa phasewete ya gago. Tsebišo e fetšwa ka morago ga iri e 1.

form.title: O lebetše password ya gago?
form.description: Tsenya e-mail ya gago gomme re tla go romela linki ya go tsošološa.

validation.uppercase: Bonnyane tlhaka e tee ye kgolo

messages.requirementsMissing: Ka kgopelo kgotsofatša dinyakwa ka moka tša password
messages.errorFallback: Failed to reset password. Mohlomongwe poledišano yeo e fedile.

success.title: Password Reset Successful
success.description: Pukwana ya gago ya boitsebišo e mpshafaditšwe ka katlego.

form.title: Reset your password
form.description: Tsenya phasewete ya gago ye mpsha ka tlase.
form.requirementsMet: Password e kgotsofatša dinyakwa ka moka

messages.invalidLink: Invalid confirmation link. Ka kgopelo šomiša linki ya e-mail ya gago.
messages.successFallback: E-mail ya gago e tiišeditšwe ka katlego.
messages.errorFallback: O paletšwe ke go tiišetša e-mail. Mohlomongwe poledišano yeo e fedile.

state.loadingDescription: Please wait while we verify your email address...
state.successDescription: E-mail ya gago e kgonthišitšwe ka katlego.
state.errorDescription: Re ka se kgone go tiišetša aterese ya gago ya emeile.

success.nextStep: Bjale o ka tsena ka akhaonteng ya gago ka e-mail le phasewete ya gago.

error.helpText: Ge e le gore se se tšwela pele, ikgokaganye le thekgo goba ingwadiše gape.
